info.title: PayID Platform API
info.description: API documentation for the PayID Platform — including OAuth 2.0 Authentication, Organization Management, API Keys, KYC Verification, Analytics, Billing, and more.

apiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
apiKeyAuth.description: API Key via Authorization header. Format: `ApiKey <key>`

xApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
xApiKeyAuth.description: API Key via X-Api-Key header. Format: `<key>` (no prefix needed)
